sizing_rule.note: Static fractional f strategy: maintain constant position size as a fixed fraction of optimal f throughout account lifetime, independent of equity fluctuations. Position held constant over time per Ralph Vince's approach, positioning left of efficient frontier.

source_rule_text: Static fractional f strategy maintains a constant position on the Capital Market Line (CML) throughout the account's life regardless of equity changes, positioning the account to the left of the optimal portfolio.
